mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member_coupon (member_coupon_id, member_id, coupon_id , status, issued_at, expired_at) VALUES (member_coupon_seq.NEXTVAL,#{memberId}, #{couponId}, 'UNUSED', SYSDATE, #{expiredAt})
mapper.select: SELECT mc.member_coupon_id AS memberCouponId, mc.member_id AS memberId, mc.coupon_id AS couponId, mc.status, mc.issued_at AS issuedAt, mc.expired_at AS expiredAt, c.coupon_name AS couponName, c.discount_amount AS discountAmount, c.discount_type AS discountType, c.min_order_amount AS minOrderAmount FROM member_coupon mc JOIN coupon c ON mc.coupon_id = c.coupon_id WHERE mc.member_id = #{memberId} AND mc.status = #{status} ORDER BY mc.issued_at DESC
